推荐场景: 旅行同伴聊天｜复述昨天发生的事
60秒任务: 「讲昨天」：A2出门信息综合；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: A2场景综合｜多信息抓取｜简单故事｜任务迁移
场景族: 酒店前台｜房间｜早餐区｜机场｜综合服务台
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Yesterday, we went to ___.（故事开头）
First, we took the bus.（顺序一）
Then we checked in at the hotel.（顺序二）
We had lunch at a small restaurant.（午餐）
I ordered noodles.（点餐）
The food was good, but a little spicy.（评价）
We met a staff member.（遇到人）
He helped us with the room.（帮助）
I lost my charger.（小问题）
Later, I found it in my bag.（解决）
We were tired, so we slept early.（原因+结果）
What did you do yesterday?（追问）
It was a good day.（总结）
I will tell you more tomorrow.（后续）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: yesterday, bus, hotel, lunch, restaurant, noodles, staff, room, charger, bag
Verbs: went, took, checked in, ordered, met, helped, lost, found, slept, tell
Adjectives: good, spicy, tired, small, early
Time / Place: first, then, later, tomorrow, in my bag
Chunks: checked in, slept early, good day, a little spicy, tell you more
